import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = parts.len()
  while i < n
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        out = list.push(out, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        out = list.push(out, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

fn max_index(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Int
  mut best_idx = 0
  mut best_val = 0
  match xs.get(0)
  when Some(v)
    best_val = v
  when None
    ()
  end
  mut i = 1
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v > best_val
        best_val = v
        best_idx = i
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  best_idx
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut xs = parse_ints(line1)
let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

let n = xs.len()
mut take = k
if take > n
  take = n
end

mut output = ""
mut i = 0
while i < take
  let idx = max_index(xs)
  let val = match xs.get(idx)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if i == 0
    output = "#{val}"
  else
    output = "#{output} #{val}"
  end
  xs = remove_at(xs, idx)
  i = i + 1
end

println(output)
